svg.text: what actually happens when you ask Claude to do something — including agent context, skills, and SubAgent spawning
Claude Code on your machine · agentic harness
stop: end_turn → "I added logging to main.ts ..."
If Claude decides it needs a GitHub PR instead of a local edit, the same loop applies:
Local Agent → MCP Server → GitHub API
Subagent spawning via Agent tool — independent context:
If Claude outputs tool_use: Agent, the Local Agent creates a child with its own context, skills, and tools (cannot nest further):
tool_result: Agent result → appended to parent messages[] → parent loop continues
• Local Agent always sits between Claude API and any tool — Claude never executes directly
• CLAUDE.md delivered as user message, not in system prompt
What's new in the agent-aware loop:
• Skill descriptions loaded at start; full content loads only when invoked
• Subagent gets independent context/loop — cannot spawn further subagents
Complex tasks may take 10-50+ round trips
